name: Inform P. Lykos Holdings S.A.
summary: Inform P. Lykos Holdings S.A. engages in the information management and digital security services business in Greece, Romania, and internationally. It offers printing products, such as business forms, paper rolls, security forms, and commercial printing. The company also provides business process outsourcing services, including physical and digital statement and bill printing, fulfilment, electronic bill presentment, card personalization, loyalty software applications, and printing management services for financial institutions, telecommunication companies, transport and infrastructure sectors, and retail and leisure companies, as well as public sector organizations. It offers information management services under the INFORM brand. The company was formerly known as Inform P. Lykos S.A. and changed its name to Inform P. Lykos Holdings S.A. in 2020. Inform P. Lykos Holdings S.A. was founded in 1897 and is headquartered in Koropi, Greece. Inform P. Lykos Holdings S.A. is a subsidiary of AUSTRIACARD HOLDINGS AG.
